name: Network Profile History (Wi-Fi & Wired)
categoryDescription: Network configuration, remote access tools, and network connection history.
description: Complete history of every network the system connected to — wired and wireless — with first/last timestamps, SSID, gateway MAC, and classification.
forensic_value: Proves network connectivity at specific times. Unmanaged = public/home networks. First/LastConnected timestamps reconstruct device location history.
